headline: Visa Neat Partnership Puts AI Insurance At Core Of Card Story
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) has partnered with Neat to add AI-driven, embedded insurance and medical assistance features to Visa cards across Europe. The collaboration aims to personalize coverage and automate parts of the claims process for cardholders. The move extends Visa's offerings beyond payments into digital insurance services that sit directly inside the card experience. Visa, trading at $315.1, is adding this new insurance functionality at a time when its long term returns remain positive, with...
